records.question: What players named Anderson, born in December 1930, weighing exactly 165 pounds, who played left wing and last played in the NHL in 1967, were coached in 1974?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
JOIN coaches ON master.coachid = coaches.coachid
WHERE master.lastnhl = '1967' AND master.birthyear = '1930' AND master.lastname = 'Anderson' AND master.weight = '165' AND master.birthmon = '12' AND master.pos = 'L' AND coaches.year = 1974
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.playerID
FROM Master m
INNER JOIN Coaches c ON m.coachID = c.coachID
WHERE m.lastNHL = '1967'
  AND m.birthYear = '1930'
  AND m.lastName = 'Anderson'
  AND m.weight = '165'
  AND m.birthMon = '12'
  AND m.pos = 'L'
  AND c.year = 1974

records.question: Who is the Canadian defenseman named Daryl, born in December, who shoots left, has hrefid stanlda01, ihdbid 5141, and started their first NHL season in 1983?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
WHERE master.hrefid = 'stanlda01' AND master.shootcatch = 'L' AND master.firstname = 'Daryl' AND master.pos = 'D' AND master.birthcountry = 'Canada' AND master.birthmon = '12' AND master.ihdbid = '5141' AND master.firstnhl = '1983'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT master.playerID
FROM Master
WHERE master.hrefID = 'stanlda01'
  AND master.shootCatch = 'L'
  AND master.firstName = 'Daryl'
  AND master.pos = 'D'
  AND master.birthCountry = 'Canada'
  AND master.birthMon = '12'
  AND master.ihdbID = '5141'
  AND master.firstNHL = '1983'

records.question: What players named Abel born in Melville have coaches with postg exactly 6, l exactly 29.0, and at least 70.0 games coached, who earned the Second Team All-Star award in the NHL in 1941 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
JOIN coaches ON master.coachid = coaches.coachid
JOIN awardsplayers ON master.playerid = awardsplayers.playerid
WHERE coaches.postg = '6' AND master.birthcity = 'Melville' AND coaches.l = 29.0 AND coaches.g >= 70.0 AND master.lastname = 'Abel' AND awardsplayers.award = 'Second Team All-Star' AND awardsplayers.year <= 1941 AND awardsplayers.lgid = 'NHL'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.playerID
FROM Master m
WHERE m.birthCity = 'Melville'
  AND m.lastName = 'Abel'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Coaches c
    WHERE m.coachID = c.coachID
      AND c.postg = '6'
      AND c.l = 29.0
      AND c.g >= 70.0
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM AwardsPlayers ap
    WHERE m.playerID = ap.playerID
      AND ap.award = 'Second Team All-Star'
      AND ap.year <= 1941
      AND ap.lgID = 'NHL'
  )

records.question: Which master entities that have related coaches and awardsplayers records have a legendsid exactly equal to 'P197802'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
JOIN coaches ON master.coachid = coaches.coachid
JOIN awardsplayers ON master.playerid = awardsplayers.playerid
WHERE master.legendsid = 'P197802'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.playerID
FROM Master m
WHERE m.legendsID = 'P197802'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Coaches c
    WHERE c.coachID = m.coachID
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM AwardsPlayers ap
    WHERE ap.playerID = m.playerID
)

records.question: What players were born in ON and have a height that is exactly 69 and were coached by coaches who received awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
JOIN coaches ON master.coachid = coaches.coachid
JOIN awardscoaches ON coaches.coachid = awardscoaches.coachid
WHERE master.birthstate = 'ON' AND master.height = '69'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.playerID
FROM Master m
INNER JOIN Coaches c ON m.coachID = c.coachID
INNER JOIN AwardsCoaches ac ON c.coachID = ac.coachID
WHERE m.birthState = 'ON' AND m.height = '69'

records.question: Which master entities have the first name exactly 'Larry', have an ihdbid exactly '4612', have related coaches with lgid exactly 'NHL' and postg exactly '4', and also have related awardsplayers records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT master.playerid FROM master
JOIN coaches ON master.coachid = coaches.coachid
JOIN awardsplayers ON master.playerid = awardsplayers.playerid
WHERE master.firstname = 'Larry' AND coaches.lgid = 'NHL' AND coaches.postg = '4' AND master.ihdbid = '4612'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.playerID
FROM Master m
LEFT JOIN Coaches c ON m.coachID = c.coachID
LEFT JOIN AwardsPlayers ap ON m.playerID = ap.playerID
WHERE m.firstName = 'Larry'
  AND m.ihdbID = '4612'
  AND c.lgID = 'NHL'
  AND c.postg = '4'
  AND ap.playerID IS NOT NULL
